security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:8723 http://localhost:8723; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: XmanBrowser — free & open-source fingerprint browser by XmanX. Isolated profiles with consistent fingerprints, per-profile proxy, and storage isolation.
